rationale: The synthetic ensures is an implication `H ==> det_equal`, so the conjuncts of H are not in body-scope; the previous attempt's `assert(forall ...)` failed because nothing on the entry path made the per-run forall true. Wrap the proof in `if H_relevant { ... }` to put the conjuncts on a path condition, then do a pointwise case-split (`p == ioid` vs `p != ioid`), going through `pre_self_@[ioid]` as the common reference point for every pinned PageTable field, and close with Seq extensionality (`=~=`) on the two Array views.
